pred_reason: The contract contains reentrancy vulnerabilities in the withdraw function and safeMint usage, aligning with SWC-107. Additionally, integer overflow/underflow risks in supply tracking operations correspond to SWC-101. Evidence: Withdraw function uses low-level call before state updates, violating checks-effects-interactions; _mintLoop function has arithmetic overflow risks in supply counting; _safeMint enables reentrancy through ERC721 receiver callbacks
